metadata.significance: Describes the Day of Judgment as a striking calamity with vivid imagery

translations.en_yusufali: What is the (Day) of Noise and Clamour?
translations.ms_basmeih: Apa dia hari yang menggemparkan itu?

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what the (Day) of Noise and Clamour is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui kedahsyatan hari yang menggemparkan itu? -

translations.en_sahih: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,
translations.en_yusufali: (It is) a Day whereon men will be like moths scattered about,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Hari itu ialah: hari kiamat), hari manusia menjadi seperti kelkatu yang terbang berkeliaran,

translations.en_sahih: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
translations.en_yusufali: And the mountains will be like carded wool.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan gunung-ganang menjadi seperti bulu yang dibusar berterbangan.

translations.en_sahih: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
translations.en_yusufali: Then, he whose balance (of good deeds) will be (found) heavy,
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah berlaku demikian, maka (manusia akan diberikan tempatnya menurut amal masing-masing); adapun orang yang berat timbangan amal baiknya, -

translations.en_sahih: He will be in a pleasant life.
translations.en_yusufali: Will be in a life of good pleasure and satisfaction.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ia berada dalam kehidupan yang senang lenang.

translations.en_sahih: But as for one whose scales are light,
translations.en_yusufali: But he whose balance (of good deeds) will be (found) light,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebaliknya orang yang ringan timbangan amal baiknya, -

translations.en_sahih: His refuge will be an abyss.
translations.en_yusufali: Will have his home in a (bottomless) Pit.

translations.en_sahih: And what can make you know what that is?
translations.en_yusufali: And what will explain to thee what this is?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui, apa dia "Haawiyah" itu?

translations.en_sahih: It is a Fire, intensely hot.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Haawiyah itu ialah): api yang panas membakar.
